title: Cobblemon: SirDoof [1.7]
description: An addon for Cobblemon that adds Sirdoof variant and a method to obtain it.
body: # Sirdoof – The Luxury Ball Legend ### 🎲 Mechanics - Small chance on capture (**1/30 by default**) to transform Bidoof into Sirdoof. - Purely cosmetic, no stat changes. - Capture is announced server-wide with a **global broadcast**: (Player has captured a Sirdoof!)
